_publications._publicationTitle: A Fibroblast-Derived Secretome Stimulates the Growth and Invasiveness of 3D Plexiform Neurofibroma Spheroids.

_contextSnippet: pNF1 spheroids cultured in Fib-CM were significantly larger than pNF1s cultured in CtrlM...pNF1 spheroids grown in Fib-CM for five days demonstrated large cell clusters connected through long cell extensions
details: Spheroids were significantly larger in fibroblast-conditioned media; demonstrated large cell clusters connected through long cell extensions after 5 days
